name: GIGABYTE B650M K Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8000(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN (B650M K)
